item.title: feat(apple): port the working claw indicator, wait phrases, and turn …
item.summary: feat(apple): port the working claw indicator, wait phrases, and turn recap to iOS/macOS (#112188) * feat(chat): add native working progress state * feat(chat): port working claw indicator to Apple * fix(apple): isolate generated locale catalog * style(apple): use doc comments on ChatWorkingPhrase API declaration
